requirement: Initialize PMAI-P0-02 without executing backup, restore, migration, or application write.
notes: Package initialization only; stage remains IN_PROGRESS.

requirement: PMAI-P0-01 hands off only to rollback and restore evidence.
Record a non-secret staging service label and proof of production isolation.
notes: No connection URI or credential may be committed.

requirement: Capture provider backup identifier and creation timestamp.
notes: Identifier must be non-secret and sanitized.

requirement: Capture provider backup success or integrity evidence.
notes: Raw backup archive must not be committed.

requirement: Restore into a disposable target isolated from production.
notes: Record a non-secret restore target label.

requirement: Record restore start, finish, and duration.
Verify restored revision and Alembic head remain 0009_diag_data.
notes: No stamp-head or manual revision edit.

requirement: Compare required clinical and audit table row counts.
Read back a pseudonymized sample case and linked diagnostic and audit data.
notes: Do not commit owner contact details or raw clinical free text.

requirement: Capture sanitized restore-based rollback drill output and expected restored state.
notes: P0-02 does not apply or downgrade 0010.

requirement: Record failure criteria, escalation role, and incident owner.
notes: A role label is sufficient; personal contact data is not required.

requirement: Do not use stamp head or manually edit Alembic revision state.
Evidence files contain no database URL, credential, access token, owner email, or phone number.
Production remains revision/head 0009 with schema_ok and no migration errors.
Remain on HOLD until all P0-02 external evidence is verified.
notes: Completion may hand off to authenticated staging smoke only.
